original: Well, what a year that was.
translation: 哇，这一年真是不得了。

original: 2025 was huge for construction.
translation: 2025年对建筑业来说是个大年。

original: We've seen things go up, things come down,
translation: 我们见证了各种工程的兴建与倒塌，

original: and pretty much everything happen in between.
translation: 几乎什么状况都发生过。

original: It's because thousands of skilled, hardworking people in this industry
translation: 这是因为行业里成千上万技术精湛、勤劳肯干的人

original: get up every day to shape our world
translation: 每天都在用双手塑造我们的世界，

original: and kind of make it look easy,
translation: 看起来轻描淡写，

original: but it's not.
translation: 但其实一点都不简单。

original: Sometimes things can go wrong.
translation: 有时候，事情就是会出岔子。

original: And look, we love talking about what makes this industry great.
translation: 我们一向喜欢聊这个行业里那些了不起的事情。

original: So, it's not that we want to make a big deal out of it,
translation: 所以我们并不是要小题大做，

original: but it's the end of the year
translation: 但年底了嘛，

original: and everyone loves a big roundup video.
translation: 大家都爱看年终盘点视频。

original: So, here are the 10 biggest construction disasters of 2025.
translation: 那就来看看2025年十大建筑工程灾难。

original: First up, you may remember this.
translation: 首先，你可能还记得这件事。

original: >> It was the dramatic moment in September
translation: >> 这是九月份那惊心动魄的一幕——

original: when a huge sinkhole tore open a street in Bangkok.
translation: 曼谷街头突然裂开一个巨大的天坑。

original: 40 m beneath the surface,
translation: 在地下40米深处，

original: work was progressing on this,
translation: 曼谷地铁紫线新延伸段的施工工作正在推进。

original: a new extension to the Bangkok Metro's Purple Line.
translation: 曼谷地铁紫线新延伸段的施工工作正在推进。

original: Here's the location of the new Vajira Hospital Station.
translation: 这里就是新建的瓦吉拉医院站的位置。

original: The problem started when work connecting the tunnel to the station hall
translation: 问题出在隧道与站厅

original: ruptured the ceiling,
translation: 连接施工时，顶板被打穿，

original: causing the tunnel to collapse.
translation: 导致隧道发生坍塌。

original: The first clue something was wrong came early in the morning
translation: 最早的异常迹象出现在清晨，

original: when water was seen welling up on the road.
translation: 地面开始涌水。

original: Then, at 7:13 a.m., this happened.
translation: 随后，早上7点13分，这一幕发生了。

original: A massive 50 m deep sinkhole opened up
translation: 一个深达50米的巨型天坑骤然裂开，

original: large enough to swallow the leaning tower of Pisa.
translation: 大到足以将比萨斜塔整个吞进去。

original: And if that wasn't bad enough,
translation: 更糟糕的是，

original: what was the name of that station again?
translation: 这个车站叫什么名字来着？

original: That's right.
translation: 没错。

original: This is where the sinkhole opened up.
translation: 天坑就在这里裂开。

original: And this is Vajara Hospital,
translation: 而这里是瓦吉拉医院，

original: home to around 30,000 inatients and 700,000 outpatients every year.
translation: 每年接诊住院病人约三万名，门诊病人约七十万名。

original: The hospital was immediately evacuated.
translation: 医院随即紧急疏散。

original: And fortunately, there were no casualties.
translation: 所幸没有人员伤亡。

original: Work on the tunnel was paused immediately and is yet to continue.
translation: 隧道施工随即全面暂停，目前尚未复工。

original: Now, statistically, most of you watching this video are American.
translation: 从统计数据来看，看这个视频的大多数人是美国人。

original: But still, a few of you may recognize this.
translation: 不过，还是有一些人可能认识这个地方。

original: Old Trafford, home to Manchester United,
translation: 老特拉福德，曼彻斯特联队的主场，

original: one of the greatest football teams in the world.
translation: 世界上最伟大的足球俱乐部之一。

original: Or at least they were until their legendary manager retired in 2013.

original: And they've kind of been rubbish ever since.
translation: 自那以后，他们的状态就一直不太行了。

original: So, like any club would do when their team is underperforming,

original: they decided to build
translation: 都会做的那样，

original: a huge brand new multi-million dollar stadium.

original: Britain's most famous football club
translation: 英国最著名的足球俱乐部

original: turned to Britain's most famous architect

original: and the coolest guy you've ever seen in a purple suit,

original: This is what he came up with.

original: A vast 100,000 seat stadium sheltered under a huge umbrella

original: capable of harvesting sunlight and rainwater.

original: You people have stood in my way long enough.

original: >> I don't think any of us expected him to say that.

translation: 我们遭遇了第一次延误。

original: >> German efficiency is very disappointing.
translation: >> 德国效率真是令人大失所望。

original: Germany's rail system has been a mess for a while,
translation: 德国铁路系统已经乱了一段时间，

original: but efforts are being made to upgrade it
translation: 但各方正在努力将其升级到

original: to something at least functional.
translation: 至少能正常运转的水平。

original: The flagship project is this Stutgart 21. The plan is simple.
translation: 其中的旗舰项目就是斯图加特21工程，计划很简单：

original: Turn the city's main terminus into a through station
translation: 将该市的主要终点站改造成贯通式车站，

original: and transform it into a regional hub.
translation: 并将其升级为区域交通枢纽。

original: Needless to say, it's not been as simple as that.
translation: 不用说，事情并没有那么简单。

original: One major problem has been the gradient of the tracks in the tunnels.
translation: 其中一个主要问题是隧道内轨道的坡度。

original: The maximum regulations allow for is 0.25%.
translation: 规定允许的最大坡度为0.25%。

original: But the tunnels in Stokart are laid to 1.51%
translation: 但斯图加特隧道内的坡度达到了1.51%，

original: which means trains could start rolling away from the platform
translation: 这意味着列车有可能在停站后

original: under their own momentum.
translation: 因自身惯性而自行滑动。

original: More recently, problems have emerged with the new signaling system
translation: 最近又出现了新信号系统方面的问题，

original: that's designed to phase out old-fashioned lights.
translation: 该系统本是为了取代传统信号灯而设计的。

original: Details are light, but a series of risks have emerged
translation: 细节尚不明朗，但一系列风险已经浮现，

original: and the whole upgrade is stuck on red.
translation: 整个升级项目目前陷入停摆。

original: And in case you were invited to the grand opening party in 2026,
translation: 万一你收到了2026年竣工庆典的邀请，

original: it's unfortunately been cancelled.
translation: 很遗憾，那个派对已经取消了。

original: While Germany might be struggling with engineering,
translation: 德国在工程建设上或许举步维艰，

original: one of America's flagship rail projects is being held up
translation: 而美国一个标志性铁路项目的停滞

original: for a very different reason.
translation: 则是另有原因。

original: California highspeed rail has been plagued by delays and cost blowouts
translation: 加州高速铁路自2015年破土动工以来，

original: since it broke ground back in 2015.
translation: 一直深陷延误和超支的泥潭。

original: It turns out that buying land in one of the most expensive parts
translation: 事实证明，在全国地价最贵的地区之一征地，

original: of the country costs quite a bit of money.
translation: 确实要花不少钱。

original: Now, President Trump has never been a fan of this project.
translation: 众所周知，特朗普总统从来就不支持这个项目。

original: He tried to pull funding during his first term,
translation: 他在第一任期内曾试图撤资，

original: and then in July 2025, he tried again,
translation: 然后在2025年7月再度出手，

original: claiming back over 45 billion US in federal funding.
translation: 声称要追回逾450亿美元的联邦拨款。

original: That's being challenged in the courts, and a resolution isn't expected anytime soon.
translation: 此事目前正在法院提出挑战，短期内看不到解决的希望。

original: But it's not the only infrastructure project in the US
translation: 但这并不是美国唯一一个

original: that's been strapped for cash.
translation: 陷入资金困境的基础设施项目。

original: The record-breaking government shutdown in October, played havoc with projects right across the country.
translation: 十月份创纪录的政府关门，对全国各地的项目造成了严重冲击。

original: The worst hit was New York's Hudson tunnel gateway program,
translation: 受冲击最严重的是纽约的哈德逊隧道门户项目，

original: easily one of the most critical tunnel schemes
translation: 这毫无疑问是全美最关键的

original: in the entire country.
translation: 隧道工程之一。

original: $18 billion in federal funding, was frozen,
translation: 180亿美元的联邦拨款遭到冻结，

original: and Donald Trump even declared he had terminated the project.
translation: 特朗普甚至宣称他已终止该项目。

original: Where we go from here is anyone's guess.
translation: 接下来走向如何，谁也说不准。

original: We couldn't talk about disastrous rail projects without also mentioning
translation: 说到灾难性的铁路项目，

original: that old favorite Britain's highspeed 2.
translation: 怎么能不提那个老面孔——英国HS2高铁。

original: The country may have invented the railways 200 years ago,
translation: 这个国家或许在200年前发明了铁路，

original: but it's not gone very well since.
translation: 但自那以后就一直没太顺过。

original: Where to start with HS2?
translation: 从哪里说起HS2呢？

original: Well, that's partly the problem.
translation: 嗯，这本身就是问题的一部分。

original: The ill- fated line was meant to link London
translation: 这条命运多舛的线路原本计划将伦敦

original: with several destinations in the north of England.
translation: 与英格兰北部多个城市相连。

original: So, in 2020, construction began in London.
translation: 2020年，施工从伦敦率先启动。

original: Now, a cynic would say that they only started in London
translation: 悲观者会说，他们之所以只从伦敦开始，

original: because the project was highly unpopular from the start
translation: 是因为这个项目从一开始就不得人心，

original: and the UK government wouldn't have to fully commit to building the entire network
translation: 英国政府这样一来就不必全面承诺建设整个路网，

original: and could scrap parts of it
translation: 一旦哪段线路引发争议，

original: if the route ever got too controversial.
translation: 随时可以砍掉。

original: But of course, that would never happen.
translation: 当然啦，那种事绝对不会发生。

original: Although, that's literally exactly what happened.
translation: 尽管，那恰恰就是实际发生的事。

original: Today, HS2 is 335 km shorter,
translation: 时至今日，HS2缩短了335公里，

original: 68 billion pounds more expensive,
translation: 多花了680亿英镑，

original: and no one really knows when it's going to be finished.
translation: 而且没人真正知道它什么时候能建完。

original: So, what's new?
translation: 那有什么新进展呢？

original: Well, in October, it was announced that a 29 km section
translation: 嗯，十月份有消息宣布，一段29公里的区间

original: linking HS2 to the rest of the mainline network
translation: ——用于将HS2与主干铁路网络连接——

original: was being depprioritized, meaning it won't be finished for another 4 years.
translation: 被列为"非优先"，意味着至少还要再等4年才能完工。

original: But at this stage, who's even still counting?
translation: 但走到这一步，还有谁在认真计数呢？

original: So, there you have it.
translation: 好了，就是这些。

original: The 10 biggest construction fails of 2025,
translation: 2025年十大建筑工程失败案例，

original: and we ran out of time to talk about Acon's new city in Sagal,
translation: 我们没来得及聊阿康在萨迦尔的新城项目——

original: which was officially scrapped.
translation: 那个已经被正式叫停了。

original: Now, if you've had enough Shard and Freder and want to see
translation: 如果你已经看够了失败案例，

original: some truly impressive mega projects in 26,
translation: 想在2026年见识一些真正令人叹服的超级工程，

original: don't worry because we've got your back.
translation: 别担心，我们帮你搞定。

original: Make sure you subscribe to the B1M
translation: 记得订阅B1M频道，

original: to keep all this great stuff coming into your feed.
translation: 让这些精彩内容持续出现在你的推送里。

original: Don't forget guys that we're inspiring the next generation of builders
translation: 别忘了，我们正在通过投资Brick Borrow来激励下一代建造者——

original: through our investment into Brick Borrow, a fantastic LEGO subscription service.
translation: 那是一个超棒的乐高订阅服务。

original: You can learn more and get started today over at brickbarrow.com.
translation: 想了解更多或立即开始，请访问brickbarrow.com。

original: And as always guys, if you enjoyed this video
translation: 一如既往，如果你喜欢这个视频，

original: and you want to get more from the definitive video channel for construction,
translation: 想获取更多来自这个权威建筑视频频道的内容，

original: make sure you're subscribed to the B1M.
translation: 记得订阅B1M频道。
